text.title: QA Edge Case Spec — Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end filled spec for a real-shaped edge case: locale-affected currency formatting on checkout.

section.title: Worked spec — locale tr_TR zero-amount checkout

example.code:
--- version: 1.0.0 owner: qa-eng:alice last_reviewed: 2026-05-22 incident_url: https://sentry.io/org/proj/issues/12345/ ---
# Given User account `locale=tr_TR`, `currency=TRY`, country `TR`. Cart contains one item priced 0.00 TRY (free promo).
# When Client POSTs `/api/v1/checkout` with body `{amount: 0.0, currency: "TRY", items: [...]}`.
# Then - Server returns 422 with JSON `{"error": "amount_must_be_positive"}`. - No row in `orders` table. - No PSP webhook fired (verify via psp.sandbox audit log). - Sentry issue #12345 stops reproducing on staging.
# Evidence - https://sentry.io/org/proj/issues/12345/ - https://github.com/org/repo/pull/9981 (the fix PR) - tests/regression/test_checkout_zero_amount.py
# Decisions - next_actions: - Pin pytest regression under `tests/regression/test_checkout_zero_amount.py` (owner: alice). - Add fixture `zero_amount_cart` to `tests/fixtures/cart.py`. - next_review: 2026-11-22
